title: POST /books endpoint with CRUD fields
evidence: handlers.go:70-85 handleCreate, store.go:48-62 Create, tests:53-83 TestCreateAndGetBook

title: GET /books with author filter support
evidence: handlers.go:87-95 handleList, store.go:64-91 List, tests:105-147 TestListWithAuthorFilter

title: GET /books/{id} single book retrieval
evidence: handlers.go:101-117 handleGet, store.go:93-105 Get, tests:53-83 TestCreateAndGetBook

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: handlers.go:119-143 handleUpdate, store.go:107-124 Update, tests:149-188 TestUpdateAndDelete

title: DELETE /books/{id} delete endpoint
evidence: handlers.go:145-160 handleDelete, store.go:126-139 Delete, tests:149-188 TestUpdateAndDelete

title: Go language with specified framework
evidence: go.mod defines package bookapi with Go dependencies, all source files are .go

title: SQLite embedded database storage
evidence: store.go:8 imports modernc.org/sqlite, lines 30-38 create table schema

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: handlers.go:34-41 writeJSON/writeError helpers, all endpoints use proper status codes (201 Created, 200 OK, 204 No Content, 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found, 500 Internal Server Error)

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: handlers.go:60-68 validateBook, tests:85-103 TestCreateValidationMissingFields verify validation enforced

title: Working source code in workspace
evidence: All source files present: main.go, handlers.go, store.go, handlers_test.go, go.mod, go.sum

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:1-122 includes Requirements, Setup, Run, Endpoints, Status codes, Examples, Tests, and Project layout sections

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: handlers_test.go contains 5 tests: TestHealth, TestCreateAndGetBook, TestCreateValidationMissingFields, TestListWithAuthorFilter, TestUpdateAndDelete

title: All 5 tests pass
evidence: go test ./... -v shows PASS for all tests (TestHealth, TestCreateAndGetBook, TestCreateValidationMissingFields, TestListWithAuthorFilter, TestUpdateAndDelete)

title: Code passes go vet analysis
evidence: go vet ./... produces no warnings or errors

title: No skipped tests
evidence: grep -r 't.Skip' returns 0 matches across all Go files
